boxDescription: To remove the fuse block cover, press the latches and lift it up. The vehicle may not be equipped with all the fuses, relays, and features illustrated.

The instrument panel fuse block is located on the lower side of the driver's side instrument panel. To access the fuses, remove the storage compartment. To remove the storage compartment, open the compartment and pull it out. The vehicle may not be equipped with all the fuses, relays, and features illustrated.
